name: Huff Appliance Service, LLC
description_short: Huff Appliance Service, LLC is a credit repair provider based in Nashville, Tennessee. Rated 3.9/5 with 37 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Huff Appliance Service, LLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in Nashville, Tennessee. Carrying a 3.9/5.0 Google rating from 37 reviews, Huff Appliance Service, LLC has an solid reputation among consumers in the Nashville area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Huff Appliance Service, LLC specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Nashville, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Huff Appliance Service, LLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Nashville, Tennessee area who are considering Huff Appliance Service, LLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
